title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
